title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
